temporal_description:
A high-angle, wide shot captures a massive wooden bridge at night, its structure illuminated by the intense, roaring orange flames of a large fire. The fire rages on both sides of the bridge and in the background, casting a warm, flickering glow on the dark, silhouetted landscape of trees and hills. In the top right corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The audio is dominated by a deep, ominous, and resonant musical score that creates a powerful sense of dread and epic scale. The low, sustained notes build a tense and foreboding atmosphere, suggesting a moment of great significance and impending conflict. There is no dialogue or other sound effects, allowing the dramatic music to fully command the listener's attention.

The scene cuts to a medium shot of a group of men standing in a dark, outdoor setting. They are dressed in rugged, dark clothing, including jackets and what appear to be military-style uniforms. In the center, a man with long, dark hair and a determined expression stands slightly forward. He is wearing a dark, high-collared jacket. Behind him, the other men look on with serious and somber faces. The only light source appears to be a small, flickering fire held by one of the men in the background, casting a dim, greenish light on the group. The "风行网" text remains in the top right corner.
